prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I do not have access to real-time market data, future economic indicators, or the ability to predict stock price movements. Stock prices are highly volatile and influenced by a multitude of unpredictable factors. Therefore, any specific numerical prediction or confidence interval for a stock price is speculative and beyond my capability. The point estimate provided is simply the current price given, as there is no basis for me to predict any change. The confidence intervals are illustrative placeholders, arbitrarily set to demonstrate the concept of increasing uncertainty with higher confidence levels (e.g., using notional ±1%, ±2%, ±3% of the current price), and are NOT derived from any financial model, historical data, or predictive analysis. These values should not be used for any financial decision-making.
